popularStory.headline: My Maternal 17th Great Grandfather, Archibald Gillespic Roy, of Celestine, Campbell, Master of Campbell, 8th Earl of Argyll
popularStory.description:

Born: 1412, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, son of Sir Duncan Na-Adh Campbell, 1st. Baron of Campbell, he was 30 and his mother, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Somerville於1413年4月23日出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯時，她的父親Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville43歲，母親Elisabeth De Keith53歲。她於1432年1月17日與Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年3月4日在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍享年46歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Somerville于1413年4月23日出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯时，她的父亲Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville43岁，母亲Elisabeth De Keith53岁。她于1432年1月17日与Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年3月4日在英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍享年46岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Somerville was born on 23 April 1413, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville, was 43 and her mother, Elisabeth De Keith, was 53. She married Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell on 17 January 1432, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 4 March 1460, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Somerville est née le 23 avril 1413, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth De Keith, avait 53 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell le 17 janvier 1432, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1460, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Lord of Somerville 43 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth De Keith 53. Sie hat am 17. Januar 1432 in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. März 1460 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Lochawe, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Somervilleが1413年4月23日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスで生まれた時，父Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somervilleは43歳，母Elisabeth De Keithは53歳であった。1432年1月17日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスでSir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年3月4日にイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで46歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルムンキルムン パーイッシュ チャーチ アンド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmu: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬먼 킬먼 파리시 처르치 앤드 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Somerville(이)가 1413년 4월 23일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth De Keith(은)는 53세였다. 그녀는 1432년 1월 17일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 3월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬먼 킬먼 파리시 처르치 앤드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Somerville nasceu em 23 de abril de 1413, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth De Keith, tinha 53 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell em 17 de janeiro de 1432, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de março de 1460, em Lochawe, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Somerville родилась 23 апреля 1413 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth De Keith, 53. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell 17 января 1432 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 4 марта 1460 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Somerville nació el 23 de abril de 1413, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Somerville 1st. Lord of Somerville, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elisabeth De Keith, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell el 17 de enero de 1432, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1460, en Lochawe, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
